channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Man City crisis deepens with loss to Juventus in Champions League as Barcelona and Arsenal win
item.description: Manchester City plunged deeper into trouble in the Champions League by losing 2-0 at Juventus on Wednesday, the latest setback in a scarcely believable run of poor results for the ailing English champions. City dropped to 22nd place in the 36-team standings, with only the top 24 advancing.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Big Game Bound: Colts vs Broncos could decide AFC Wildcard spot
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS – Two teams in the AFC (Buffalo and Kansas City) and two teams in the NFC (Detroit and Philadelphia) have already clinched playoff spots. There are still 10 postseason berths up for grabs over the final four weeks of the season.
item.dc:creator: Phil Nardiello - Senior Sports Producer, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lindsey Vonn savors chance to test out World Cup course as a forerunner in comeback bid at age 40
item.description: BEAVER CREEK, Colo. (AP) — Lindsey Vonn tries to take her comeback step-by-step even if there's plenty of reason — and temptation — to look down the road. On Wednesday, the 40-year-old American ski racer was concentrating solely on testing out the Birds of Prey course as a forerunner.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UNC 'on board' to have Bill Belichick become next head coach, still working out issues with deal: report
item.description: The North Carolina Tar Heels are reportedly "on board" with Bill Belichick becoming their next head football coach, but there are still issues that need to be settled.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: David Bonderman, co-founder of private equity firm TPG and co-owner of Seattle Kraken, dies at 82
item.description: David Bonderman, who managed money for one of the richest families in Texas, helped create one of the giants of the private-equity business and pushed to bring professional hockey to Seattle, died Wednesday. He was 82.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio politician proposes make flag planting a felony after fight in Michigan rivalry game
item.description: An Ohio politician has seen enough flag planting by visiting sports teams. Republican state Rep. Josh Williams said Wednesday on social media he’s introducing a bill to make flag planting in sports a felony in the state. His proposal comes after the Nov.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White Sox trade Garrett Crochet to Red Sox for prospect package
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago White Sox have traded ace starter Garrett Crochet to the Red Sox for a prospect package. The White Sox are getting back catcher Kyle Teel, who is the 25th ranked prospect in baseball by MLB.com.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Lawmaker wants ‘flag planting’ at OSU to be a felony
item.description: Days after the postgame melee, a lawmaker introduced a bill that would make “flag planting” within Ohio Stadium a felony.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: Guardians trade Gold Glove 2B Andrés Giménez to Blue Jays, get RHP Luis Ortiz in deal with Pirates
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The Cleveland Guardians broke up their infield and plugged a hole in their rotation.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NFL coach Bruce Arians offers advice to Bill Belichick as North Carolina football coaching rumors swirl
item.description: For the first football season in decades, Bill Belichick was not coaching a team. But he appears to have interest in coaching at the collegiate level.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bill Belichick considering offer to be UNC Chapel Hill head football coach
item.description: CHAPEL HILL, N.C. (WGHP) — Bill Belichick is in negotiations to potentially become the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill's next head coach. InsideCarolina’s Grant Hughes first reported that Belichick interviewed for the job earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: Mendenhall excited to take over at Utah State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Bronco Mendenhall era has begun at Utah State. Mendenhall was introduced as the Aggies new head football coach Monday, and the school is hoping he can turn the program around.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: The Bears are broken, and it wasn't the Hail Mary that broke them
item.description: Ryan Poles, the Chicago Bears' General Manager, is responsible for the team's player-execution problem, as the team has been outscored 63-13 in the first quarter this year and has a poor talent pool in key positions.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: How to watch 'Monday Night Football' in 'The Simpsons' universe
item.description: The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Kings make 22 three-pointers, blow out Jazz, 141-97
item.description: SACRAMENTO (ABC4 Sports) - On Friday, the Utah Jazz put up 141 points in a blowout win over Portland. On Sunday, they were on the receiving end of a 141-point outburst. Kevin Huerter had 26 points, including six 3-pointers, and the Sacramento Kings beat the Utah Jazz 141-97 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes QB Isaac Wilson enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utes freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson announced on Sunday that he is entering the transfer portal after one season. Wilson threw for 1,510 yards and 10 touchdowns as a freshman, starting seven games in place of injured starter Cam Rising.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFL QB Jayden Daniels scores Christmas toys for kids in San Bernardino
item.description: What does a rising star in the NFL do when his team is on its bye week? Washington Commanders quarterback Jayden Daniels decided to make sure the kids back home have a great holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Chicago hosts conference rival Philadelphia
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (6-15, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 1 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Nikola Vucevic and the Chicago Bulls take on Tyrese Maxey and the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. The Bulls are 8-7 in Eastern Conference games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: MLS Cup championship sold out as Los Angeles Galaxy shoot for 6th title
item.description: It will be a packed crowd Saturday when the Los Angeles Galaxy attempt to capture their league-record sixth MLS Cup. The Galaxy will face off with the New York Red Bulls at Dignity Health Sports Park at 1 p.m., and team officials said tickets have sold out.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Jets take on the Blackhawks Saturday following overtime win
item.description: Winnipeg Jets (19-8, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (8-16-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 4 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Winnipeg Jets visit the Chicago Blackhawks after the Jets defeated the Buffalo Sabres 3-2 in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil uniforms ahead of inaugural WNBA season
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Valkyries won’t take the court for their inaugural 2025 season until May 16, but fans are getting an early look at the WNBA team’s uniforms which were unveiled Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4
